zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas William de Marston於1403年出生在英國諾福爾可雷普斯 煙雨 巴斯特維其可時，他的父親Robert Marston26歲，母親Margaret Joynson22歲。他於1429年與Lady Frances Beckwith Goodall Goodale在英國英格蘭諾福爾可雷普斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1455年在英國艾可維丁頓享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas William de Marston于1403年出生在英国諾福爾可雷普斯 煙雨 巴斯特維其可时，他的父亲Robert Marston26岁，母亲Margaret Joynson22岁。他于1429年与Lady Frances Beckwith Goodall Goodale在英国英格兰諾福爾可雷普斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1455年在英国艾可維丁頓享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Marston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or other of the numerous places called Marston or Merston, in counties including Bedfordshire, Cheshire, Derbyshire, Gloucestershire, Isle of Wight, Kent, Northamptonshire, Oxfordshire, Shropshire, Staffordshire, Sussex, and Worcestershire. Most of the placenames derive from Old English mersc ‘marsh’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Marson
meanings: English (Midlands): variant of Marston , a common placename which was often spelled and pronounced Marson.
French: habitational name from any of the places so called in Marne and Meuse, or from Marçon in Sarthe. This surname is also found in Germany.

variants.name: Maston
meanings: English: variant of Marston with loss of -r-.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas William de Marston was born in 1403, in Repps with Bastwick, Norfolk, England, his father, Robert Marston, was 26 and his mother, Margaret Joynson, was 22. He married Lady Frances Beckwith Goodall Goodale in 1429, in Repps, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1455, in Widdington, Essex, England, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas William de Marston est né en 1403, à Repps with Bastwick, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Robert Marston, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret Joynson, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Lady Frances Beckwith Goodall Goodale en 1429, à Repps, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1455, à Widdington, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas William de Marston 1403 in Repps with Bastwick, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Marston 26 und seine Mutter Margaret Joynson 22. Er hat 1429 in Repps, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Lady Frances Beckwith Goodall Goodale geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1455 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Widdington, Essex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas William de Marston è nato il nel 1403 nel Repps with Bastwick, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Robert Marston, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Joynson, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Lady Frances Beckwith Goodall Goodale nel 1429, nel Repps, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1455, nel Widdington, Essex, England, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas William de Marstonが1403年にイギリスノーフォルクレップス ウィス バストウィックで生まれた時，父Robert Marstonは26歳，母Margaret Joynsonは22歳であった。1429年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクレップスでLady Frances Beckwith Goodall Goodaleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1455年にイギリスエセックスウィッドイントンで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas William de Marston(이)가 1403년 영국 노르폴크 레프스 위스 바스트윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Marston(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Joynson(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1429년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 레프스에서 Lady Frances Beckwith Goodall Goodale(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1455년 영국 에세스 위딩턴에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas William de Marston nasceu em 1403, em Repps with Bastwick, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Marston, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Joynson, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Frances Beckwith Goodall Goodale em 1429, em Repps, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1455, em Widdington, Essex, Inglaterra, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas William de Marston родился в 1403 г. в местности реппс вит баствикк, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Marston было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Joynson, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Frances Beckwith Goodall Goodale в 1429 г. в местности реппс, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1455 г. в местности виддингтон, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas William de Marston nació en 1403, en Repps with Bastwick, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Marston, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Margaret Joynson, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Lady Frances Beckwith Goodall Goodale en 1429, en Repps, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1455, en Widdington, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años.
